title: Bosch Professional 18V System Cordless Angle Grinder GWX 18V-7 (Disc Ø 125 mm, 700 W Power, with X-Lock Mount, incl. 5-Piece Cut-Off and Grinding disc Set, in L-BOXX) - Amazon Exclusive Set
description: Bosch Professional 18V System Cordless Angle Grinder GWX 18V-7 (Disc Ø 125 mm, 700 W power, with X-LOCK mount, incl. 5-piece cut-off and grinding disc set, in L-BOXX) - Amazon Exclusive Set
features: Powerful angle grinder with 18 volts for heavy industrial use - with X-LOCK
Convenient to use: Easy and quick change of accessories with just one click and completely without additional mounting equipment or detachable parts.
Extensive: Large selection of X-LOCK tools and X-LOCK accessories that can also be used with normal angle grinders without an X-LOCK mount
Batteries and chargers are fully compatible with the Bosch Professional 18V System and with many other tools of the multi-brand AMPShare battery alliance
Included in Amazon Exclusive: GWX 18V-7, 5x cutting- and grinding Discs set, 1x 125 mm protection guard, handle, L-BOXX 136
